description: You are an aerospace systems engineer building a Software-in-the-Loop (SITL) simulation to test a CubeSat's Attitude Determination and Control System (ADCS). Configure the simulation physics and reaction wheels to match flight hardware specifications. Set the WorldInfo gravity to 0 0 0. For the CUBESAT Robot, add a Damping node to its physics with linear and angular fields set to 0.0 to simulate a vacuum. For the yaw_joint, pitch_joint, and roll_joint reaction wheels, set the RotationalMotor maxVelocity to 600.0 rad/s and maxTorque to 0.05 Nm, and set the flywheel mass to 0.12 kg in the physics node. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/cubesat_adcs_configured.wbt.
